## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Code style change

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
- [ ] Backend starts without errors: `cd backend && python start.py`
- [ ] Frontend TypeScript compiles: `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Playwright E2E tests pass: `cd frontend && npx playwright test`
- [ ] Tested manually in browser

## Screenshots (if UI changes)
Add before/after screenshots or GIFs.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project code style (named exports, interface over type)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] No default exports added
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
